topics: Pressure Vessel - Terminology - Types of Loads - Types of Pressure - Types of Supports. Stresses in Pressure Vessels - Dilation of Pressure Vessels. Membrane Stress Analysis of Vessel Shell Components - Cylindrical Shells

Shrink Fit Stresses in Built-up Cylinders

Design of Tall Vessel under Wind and Seismic Load. Design of Leg, Lug and Saddle Supports. Buckling
Analysis of Elastic Buckling of Cylinders or Pipes under External Pressure
Design of Stiffeners for Pressure Vessel (Use Relevant ASME Codes and Standard Practices in Pressure Vessel Design for the Entire Third Module)
Pipes - Size and Wall Thickness Specification
Type of Pipes Based on Manufacturing Technique. Piping Components - Bends, Tees, Elbows, Reducers, Bellows, Flanges and Valves. Stress Analysis
